feat_faithful_to_pray.name: To Pray
feat_faithful_to_pray.description: Only at level 0, you have a +1 bonus to your hit point maximum and to your global AC.

feat_faithful_fwyc.name: From Whence You Came
feat_faithful_fwyc.description: Upon reaching level 1, you may choose a feat.

feat_zealots_bond.name: Zealot's Bond
feat_zealots_bond.description:
You learn one cantrip from the Cleric or Warlock spell list. In addition, choose a 1st level spell from that same spell list, to learn. Choose between Wisdom and Charisma as your spellcasting ability.

When you cast the 1st-level spell through your bond, you can expend one of your Hit Dice and roll it. If you roll an even number, you gain a number of temporary hit points equal to the number rolled. If you roll an odd number, one random creature within 9 meters of you (not including you) takes force damage equal to the number rolled. If no other creatures are in range, you take the damage.

If you stop worshiping or serving your Deity, you lose this feat.

aspirations.name: Faithful
aspirations.description: A beginner's guide to devotion, prayer, and divine or profane power.
aspirations.items: Common clothes, 2 rations, waterskin, Holy Symbol

hp_details.at_higher_levels: 1d6 (or 4) + your Constitution modifier per level after 1st

proficiencies_desc.saving_throws: Choose Charisma or Wisdom (only at level 0)

aspirations.starting_equipment:
You start with the following equipment, in addition to the equipment granted by your background:
* 10 gold pieces
* Common clothes, 2 rations, waterskin
* Holy Symbol
aspirations.quick_build: Choose Wisdom or Charisma as your focus. If you want to lean into divine protection, choose Wisdom; if you want to lean into presence, persuasion, or occult devotion, choose Charisma.
aspirations.multiclassing: Ability Score Minimum: Wisdom 13 or Charisma 13. Proficiencies gained from multiclassing: simple weapons.
